design_system.name: Remember QrCode - Ethereal Remembrance
design_system.description: A digital memorial platform that feels like a sanctuary. Light, airy, and respectful.

textures.grain: url("data:image/svg+xml,%3Csvg viewBox='0 0 200 200' xmlns='http://www.w3.org/2000/svg'%3E%3Cfilter id='noiseFilter'%3E%3CfeTurbulence type='fractalNoise' baseFrequency='0.65' numOctaves='3' stitchTiles='stitch'/%3E%3C/filter%3E%3Crect width='100%25' height='100%25' filter='url(%23noiseFilter)' opacity='0.05'/%3E%3C/svg%3E")

buttons.primary: bg-primary text-primary-foreground hover:bg-primary/90 rounded-full px-8 py-6 text-lg font-medium transition-all duration-300 shadow-soft hover:shadow-hover hover:-translate-y-1
buttons.secondary: bg-transparent border border-primary text-primary hover:bg-primary/5 rounded-full px-8 py-6 text-lg font-medium transition-all duration-300

cards.memorial: bg-card border border-border/50 rounded-xl overflow-hidden shadow-soft hover:shadow-hover transition-all duration-500 group
cards.feature: bg-secondary/30 backdrop-blur-sm border border-white/20 rounded-2xl p-8 hover:bg-secondary/50 transition-all duration-300

inputs.default: bg-background border-border focus:border-accent focus:ring-1 focus:ring-accent rounded-lg h-12 px-4 transition-all duration-300

decoration.usage: Section divider or subtle background accent

product_texture.usage: Background for the QR Code Plaque preview

instructions_to_main_agent: 1. SETUP: Update `tailwind.config.js` to include the custom fonts (Cormorant Garamond, Manrope) and the specific color palette defined in `css_vars`.
2. GLOBAL CSS: In `index.css`, replace the default Shadcn variables with the 'Ethereal Remembrance' values provided in `css_vars`. Ensure the `.dark` class overrides are also applied.
3. FONTS: Add the Google Fonts import to `index.css` or the main HTML file immediately.
4. COMPONENTS: When building the 'Memorial Card', use the `cards.memorial` classes. It should feel like a physical object.
5. HERO SECTION: Use the 'Hero Background' image with a soft white gradient overlay (`bg-gradient-to-b from-transparent to-background`) so the text pops.
6. PLAQUE PREVIEW: Create a component that uses the 'Brushed stainless steel' image as a background, with a rounded border and a QR code centered on it. Add a 'shine' effect using CSS gradients.
7. CANDLE FEATURE: For the 'Light a Candle' section, use a dark background (even in light mode) to make the candle flame image glow.
8. MOBILE FIRST: Ensure all padding is responsive (`p-6` mobile, `p-12` desktop). Do not use fixed widths.
9. ACCESSIBILITY: Ensure the Gold accent color has enough contrast against white. If not, darken it slightly for text, keep it bright for borders.
universal_guidelines: Do not use generic 'SaaS Blue'. Stick to the defined 'Celestial Blue' and 'Muted Gold'.
Avoid 'Inter' font. Use 'Manrope' for UI and 'Cormorant Garamond' for all headings.
Use 2x more whitespace than usual. This is a memorial site, it needs breathing room.
All interactive elements must have `data-testid` attributes.
Do not use solid black (#000000). Use the defined deep charcoal (#1a202c) or similar.
Animations should be slow and dignified (duration-700 or duration-1000), not snappy.
